title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses his approach to building two unicorns over 12 years. He emphasizes that competitive advantage comes from focused execution and differentiation rather than model scale or pitch quality, and advocates for building less to win more.
